48:
Oh gods, the pain...
I caught a scurry of squirrels gnawing on the fences earlier. I managed to drive them off, but not before they decided to gnaw on <Emphasis>me</Emphasis> instead! And now I'm the bloody mess you see before you.

51:
Seven hells, did those accursed squirrels leave any part of me untouched?
Ah, you're back! Do you have that hi-potion for me?
